Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Assigned and the end of the case

Name: Total time for Accepted + Assigned in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Assigned when followed by Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time between Accepted + Assigned and Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Assigned and Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned in variants that end with Completed + Resolved -> Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Closed occurs

Name: Average time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Accepted + Assigned
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Assigned'

Name: Total time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + Closed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned when preceded by Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment occurs

Name: Total time for Accepted + Assigned in variants containing Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Accepted + Wait - User occurs

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Assigned in variants containing Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Assigned and the end of the case

Name: Average time between Accepted + Assigned and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Total time from Accepted + Assigned to the final activity in cases that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Assigned in high-impact incidents (impact = 'High')
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Assigned and the end of the case

Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Total time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + In Call in variants where Completed + In Call appears before resolution
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Assigned and Completed + In Call when both occur within the same case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average cycle time of Accepted + Assigned in cases that do not contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call does not occur
